title: Potato Anthocyanin Extraction and Purification
author: Yuanjun Yang
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.k4mcyu6

steps.title: Macroporous resin AB-8 were soaked with...
steps.instruction: Macroporous resin AB-8 were soaked with anhydrous ethanol 24h, fully swollen, and then washed with deionized water to no alcohol, lastly the resin were dried for use.

steps.title: Potato tubers (250 g) were washed...
steps.instruction: Potato tubers (250 g) were washed with distilled water and were cut into large pieces.

steps.title: The large pieces were smashed in...
steps.instruction: The large pieces were smashed in 500 mL of a mixture containing 50% alcohol and 1.6% citric acid.

steps.title: The resulting mixture was filtrated twice...
steps.instruction: The resulting mixture was filtrated twice with filter paper and then centrifuged at 4000 rpm 10min.

steps.title: The supernatant was transferred into a...
steps.instruction: The supernatant was transferred into a column filled with the pretreated macroporous resin AB-8 for 6 h, and the pigments would be absorbed in AB-8.

steps.title: The pigments were eluted with 95%...
steps.instruction: The pigments were eluted with 95% alcohol until the resin became no color.

steps.title: The eluate was concentrated with rotary evaporator at 30 °C
steps.instruction: The eluate was concentrated with rotary evaporator at 30 °C.

steps.title: The concentrated pigments were dried in vacuo for 12 h
steps.instruction: The concentrated pigments were dried in vacuo for 12 h.
